news.title: Three cargo ships struck off Iran's coast, UK says, including one in Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: The incidents mark the latest in a string of reported attacks in or near the Strait of Hormuz. Shipping traffic has virtually ground to a halt.

news.title: Interior Secretary Burgum calls for IEA to release oil reserves to address supply disruption
news.summary: The Iran war has triggered the biggest oil disruption in history. Tankers are unwilling to transit the Strait of Hormuz because they fear attacks.

news.title: Here's the inflation breakdown for February 2026 — in one chart
news.summary: The consumer price index was rose 2.4% in February 2026, above policymakers' target. War in Iran complicates the picture.

news.title: Oil ticks higher to $85 as traders await possible historic reserve release
news.summary: Oil prices move higher as markets continue to watch developments in the U.S.-Iran war. Oil prices moved higher on Wednesday as markets continued to watch Developments in the US-Iran War.

news.title: Consumer prices rose 2.4% annually in February, as expected
news.summary: Consumer price index in February was expected to show a 2.4% increase from a year ago, according to the Dow Jones consensus. The consumer price index is a barometer of inflation.

news.title: Oil futures rise as IEA proposes largest-ever release of reserves
news.summary: Oil futures rise on Wednesday as traders awaited what could be a historic release of emergency government reserves to counter the disruption to supplies from the attack on Iran.

news.title: Unreliable nursing-home ratings raise disturbing questions — leaving families at a dead end
news.summary: The government’s “star’ ratings for nursing homes are misleading, new research finds. The ratings are based on a number of factors, including the quality of care provided.

news.title: ‘I have lost nearly everything’: My mother’s trustee changed her $1 million will and my attorney fleeced me. What can I do?
news.summary: “My attorney, who described himself as a minister doing ‘God’s work,’ had me sign a 40% contingency agreement,” he said.

news.title: Medicare Advantage insurers are overcharging taxpayers and seniors billions of dollars. Why is anyone surprised?
news.summary: The big for-profit health insurers who run the Medicare Advantage program aren’t happy with the latest government watchdog report. The report was released by the Department of Health and Human Services.

news.title: New Social Security whistleblower alleges DOGE worker improperly accessed data and planned to share it
news.summary: A former DOGE software engineer allegedly told co-workers that he had two databases of U.S. citizens’ information. According to a report, a former DogsE software. engineer allegedly said he had 2 databases of citizens' information.
